step_rationale: Thioredoxin reductase upregulated by oxLDL; antioxidant enzyme responding to lipid oxidation stress.
mechanism: TXNRD1 is induced by oxidative modification of retained lipids, mediating antioxidant defenses against atherogenic lipid burden.

references.title: Oxidized LDL induces a coordinated up-regulation of the glutathione and thioredoxin systems in human macrophages.
